templates.title: Create new landing page: {topic}
templates.description: Build a new secondary landing page or lead-magnet page for '{topic}'. Read MEMORY.md for repo and conversion goal. Write the full page copy, create the page file in the repo, and open a PR. The page should have: a clear headline targeting the audience, a single CTA aligned with the primary conversion goal, and at least one social proof element.

templates.title: Write copy variant for: {element}
templates.description: Write 3 variants for the landing page element '{element}' (e.g. 'homepage headline', 'CTA button', 'pricing section subhead'). For each variant: state the hypothesis, write the copy, note the target audience signal. Open a PR with the best variant applied; include all 3 in the PR description for reference.

templates.title: A/B test brief: {element}
templates.description: Write a structured A/B test brief for '{element}'. Include: test hypothesis, control (current copy), variant (proposed copy), primary metric to measure, minimum sample size estimate, and recommended test duration. File the brief to wiki/Projects/LandingPage/CopyVariants/ and report back with the wiki link.

templates.title: Traffic report: {period}
templates.description: Pull traffic data for '{period}' (e.g. 'last 7 days', 'last month', 'since Product Hunt launch'). Produce a structured report: total visitors, top 5 sources with %, primary conversion count and rate, notable anomalies, and one actionable insight. File to wiki/Projects/LandingPage/TrafficReports/ and report back with the wiki link.

templates.title: Analytics audit
templates.description: Audit the current analytics setup end-to-end: verify the tracking snippet is firing correctly, confirm conversion events are being captured, check for any gaps (pages without tracking, broken events). Produce a short findings doc in wiki/Projects/LandingPage/TrafficReports/audit-YYYY-MM-DD.md and open a PR for any fixes needed.

templates.title: Document design system
templates.description: Produce or update the full design system documentation at wiki/Projects/LandingPage/DesignSystem.md. Include: color tokens with usage notes, typography scale, spacing scale, component specs (buttons, cards, nav, sections, forms). Cross-reference actual values from the token file in the repo.
